name: Zhang Fei

skills.name: Dark Potential
skills.description: Human Form: Hits from Basic Attacks and skills grant madness. Ferali Form: Casting the skill reduces the Movement Speed of enemies in range.

skills.name: Forbidden Domain
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range. Knocks back enemy heroes.

skills.name: Leaping Savior
skills.description: Jumps to the target location, granting a shield to nearby teammates. Gains extra Madness for every teammate he shields.

skills.name: Unbridled Outburst
skills.description: Roars and transforms, gaining brief Invincibility, then a shield. The roar forms a gust of wind that damages, knocks back, and stuns enemies. While inside the wind, Zhang Fei gains increased Movement Speed

tips: Zhang Fei is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.1% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Blazing Cape → Ominous Premonition → Eye of the Phoenix → Overlord's Platemail.
Run Fate for stats that match Zhang Fei's Tank kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Forbidden Domain → Leaping Savior → Unbridled Outburst → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Zhang Fei excels into Arli, Consort Yu, Marco Polo. Avoid blind picking into Diaochan, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.

Zhang Fei is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Zhang Fei.

faqs.question: Is Zhang Fei good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Zhang Fei is Tier S Tank with 50.1% win rate, 1.2% pick rate, and 0.4% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Zhang Fei build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape, Ominous Premonition, Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail. Run Fate arcana with Heal. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Zhang Fei?
faqs.answer: Pick Diaochan, Wukong, Musashi into Zhang Fei. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Zhang Fei completes core items. Zhang Fei struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Zhang Fei counter?
faqs.answer: Zhang Fei is strong into Arli, Consort Yu, Marco Polo according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Zhang Fei when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Zhang Fei good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Zhang Fei is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Zhang Fei.

faqs.question: What lane should Zhang Fei play?
faqs.answer: Zhang Fei is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support, Tank). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Zhang Fei?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Heal. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Zhang Fei or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Zhang Fei vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.3% more often globally. Choose Zhang Fei when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Zhang Fei?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 0.4% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Tank.
